summary: Lead Notification System Phase 1 testing complete. Backend APIs 100% pass (14/14). Fixed missing mark-all-read endpoint. Frontend UI verified - notification bell, WebSocket connection, tab badges all working.
seed_data_creation: TEST_notification_test and TEST_mention_test messages created during pytest
context_for_next_testing_agent: Added missing POST /api/notifications/mark-all-read endpoint. All notification APIs tested and working. WebSocket connection verified via console logs. Tab badges and notification bell UI working on More, Inbox, and Team pages.

notifications_api.GET /api/notifications/?user_id={id}: PASS - Returns notifications list with count
notifications_api.POST /api/notifications/mark-all-read?us: PASS - Marks all as read (FIXED - was missing)
notifications_api.POST /api/notifications/{id}/read: PASS - Marks single notification as read

team_chat_api.GET /api/team-chat/channels/{channel_id}: PASS - Returns channel details with members
team_chat_api.POST /api/team-chat/messages: PASS - Sends message, triggers WebSocket broadcast

websocket.url_format: PASS - WSS URL constructed correctly from backend URL

frontend_ui.notification_bell_on_more_page: PASS - Bell icon visible in profile card area
frontend_ui.notification_bell_on_inbox_page: PASS - Bell icon visible in Inbox header
frontend_ui.notification_dropdown: PASS - 'Notifications' text detected in page content
frontend_ui.team_tab_badge: PASS - Red unread badge visible on Team tab
frontend_ui.inbox_tab: PASS - Inbox page loads with conversations

mocked_apis_list: Twilio SMS - outbound SMS messages are logged but not actually sent
